english_name: The Epistle of Paul the Apostle to the Ephesians

verses.latin_vulgate: Hujus rei gratia, ego Paulus vinctus Christi Jesu, pro vobis gentibus,
verses.greek_textus_receptus: τούτου χάριν ἐγὼ παῦλος ὁ δέσμιος τοῦ χριστοῦ ἰησοῦ ὑπὲρ ὑμῶν τῶν ἐθνῶν
verses.king_james: For this cause I Paul, the prisoner of Jesus Christ for you Gentiles,

verses.latin_vulgate: si tamen audistis dispensationem gratiæ Dei, quæ data est mihi in vobis:
verses.greek_textus_receptus: εἴγε ἠκούσατε τὴν οἰκονομίαν τῆς χάριτος τοῦ θεοῦ τῆς δοθείσης μοι εἰς ὑμᾶς
verses.king_james: If ye have heard of the dispensation of the grace of God which is given me to you-ward:

verses.latin_vulgate: quoniam secundum revelationem notum mihi factum est sacramentum, sicut supra scripsi in brevi,
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ὅτι κατὰ ἀποκάλυψιν ἐγνώρισεν μοι τὸ μυστήριον καθὼς προέγραψα ἐν ὀλίγῳ
verses.king_james: How that by revelation he made known unto me the mystery; (as I wrote afore in few words,

verses.latin_vulgate: prout potestis legentes intelligere prudentiam meam in mysterio Christi:
verses.greek_textus_receptus: πρὸς ὃ δύνασθε ἀναγινώσκοντες νοῆσαι τὴν σύνεσίν μου ἐν τῷ μυστηρίῳ τοῦ χριστοῦ
verses.king_james: Whereby, when ye read, ye may understand my knowledge in the mystery of Christ)

verses.latin_vulgate: quod aliis generationibus non est agnitum filiis hominum, sicuti nunc revelatum est sanctis apostolis ejus et prophetis in Spiritu,
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ὃ ἐν ἑτέραις γενεαῖς οὐκ ἐγνωρίσθη τοῖς υἱοῖς τῶν ἀνθρώπων ὡς νῦν ἀπεκαλύφθη τοῖς ἁγίοις ἀποστόλοις αὐτοῦ καὶ προφήταις ἐν πνεύματι
verses.king_james: Which in other ages was not made known unto the sons of men, as it is now revealed unto his holy apostles and prophets by the Spirit;

verses.latin_vulgate: gentes esse cohæredes, et concorporales, et comparticipes promissionis ejus in Christo Jesu per Evangelium:
verses.greek_textus_receptus: εἶναι τὰ ἔθνη συγκληρονόμα καὶ σύσσωμα καὶ συμμέτοχα τῆς ἐπαγγελίας αὐτοῦ ἐν τῷ χριστῷ διὰ τοῦ εὐαγγελίου
verses.king_james: That the Gentiles should be fellowheirs, and of the same body, and partakers of his promise in Christ by the gospel:

verses.latin_vulgate: cujus factus sum minister secundum donum gratiæ Dei, quæ data est mihi secundum operationem virtutis ejus.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: οὗ ἐγενόμην διάκονος κατὰ τὴν δωρεὰν τῆς χάριτος τοῦ θεοῦ τὴν δοθεῖσαν μοι κατὰ τὴν ἐνέργειαν τῆς δυνάμεως αὐτοῦ
verses.king_james: Whereof I was made a minister, according to the gift of the grace of God given unto me by the effectual working of his power.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mihi omnium sanctorum minimo data est gratia hæc, in gentibus evangelizare investigabiles divitias Christi,
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἐμοὶ τῷ ἐλαχιστοτέρῳ πάντων τῶν ἁγίων ἐδόθη ἡ χάρις αὕτη ἐν τοῖς ἔθνεσιν εὐαγγελίσασθαι τὸν ἀνεξιχνίαστον πλοῦτον τοῦ χριστοῦ
verses.king_james: Unto me, who am less than the least of all saints, is this grace given, that I should preach among the Gentiles the unsearchable riches of Christ;

verses.latin_vulgate: et illuminare omnes, quæ sit dispensatio sacramenti absconditi a sæculis in Deo, qui omnia creavit:
verses.greek_textus_receptus: καὶ φωτίσαι πάντας τίς ἡ κοινωνία τοῦ μυστηρίου τοῦ ἀποκεκρυμμένου ἀπὸ τῶν αἰώνων ἐν τῷ θεῷ τῷ τὰ πάντα κτίσαντι διὰ ἰησοῦ χριστοῦ
verses.king_james: And to make all *men* see what *is* the fellowship of the mystery, which from the beginning of the world hath been hid in God, who created all things by Jesus Christ:

verses.latin_vulgate: ut innotescat principatibus et potestatibus in cælestibus per Ecclesiam, multiformis sapientia Dei,
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἵνα γνωρισθῇ νῦν ταῖς ἀρχαῖς καὶ ταῖς ἐξουσίαις ἐν τοῖς ἐπουρανίοις διὰ τῆς ἐκκλησίας ἡ πολυποίκιλος σοφία τοῦ θεοῦ
verses.king_james: To the intent that now unto the principalities and powers in heavenly *places* might be known by the church the manifold wisdom of God,

verses.latin_vulgate: secundum præfinitionem sæculorum, quam fecit in Christo Jesu Domino nostro:
verses.greek_textus_receptus: κατὰ πρόθεσιν τῶν αἰώνων ἣν ἐποίησεν ἐν χριστῷ ἰησοῦ τῷ κυρίῳ ἡμῶν
verses.king_james: According to the eternal purpose which he purposed in Christ Jesus our Lord:

verses.latin_vulgate: in quo habemus fiduciam, et accessum in confidentia per fidem ejus.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἐν ᾧ ἔχομεν τὴν παῤῥησίαν καὶ τὴν προσαγωγὴν ἐν πεποιθήσει διὰ τῆς πίστεως αὐτοῦ
verses.king_james: In whom we have boldness and access with confidence by the faith of him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propter quod peto ne deficiatis in tribulationibus meis pro vobis: quæ est gloria vestra.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: διὸ αἰτοῦμαι μὴ ἐκκακεῖν ἐν ταῖς θλίψεσίν μου ὑπὲρ ὑμῶν ἥτις ἐστὶν δόξα ὑμῶν
verses.king_james: Wherefore I desire that ye faint not at my tribulations for you, which is your glory.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hujus rei gratia flecto genua mea ad Patrem Domini nostri Jesu Christi,
verses.greek_textus_receptus: τούτου χάριν κάμπτω τὰ γόνατά μου πρὸς τὸν πατέρα τοῦ κυρίου ἡμῶν ἰησοῦ χριστοῦ
verses.king_james: For this cause I bow my knees unto the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ,

verses.latin_vulgate: ex quo omnis paternitas in cælis et in terra nominatur,
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἐξ οὗ πᾶσα πατριὰ ἐν οὐρανοῖς καὶ ἐπὶ γῆς ὀνομάζεται
verses.king_james: Of whom the whole family in heaven and earth is named,

verses.latin_vulgate: ut det vobis secundum divitias gloriæ suæ, virtute corroborari per Spiritum ejus in interiorem hominem,
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἵνα δῴη ὑμῖν κατὰ τὸν πλοῦτον τῆς δόξης αὐτοῦ δυνάμει κραταιωθῆναι διὰ τοῦ πνεύματος αὐτοῦ εἰς τὸν ἔσω ἄνθρωπον
verses.king_james: That he would grant you, according to the riches of his glory, to be strengthened with might by his Spirit in the inner man;

verses.latin_vulgate: Christum habitare per fidem in cordibus vestris: in caritate radicati, et fundati,
verses.greek_textus_receptus: κατοικῆσαι τὸν χριστὸν διὰ τῆς πίστεως ἐν ταῖς καρδίαις ὑμῶν ἐν ἀγάπῃ ἐῤῥιζωμένοι καὶ τεθεμελιωμένοι
verses.king_james: That Christ may dwell in your hearts by faith; that ye, being rooted and grounded in love,

verses.latin_vulgate: ut possitis comprehendere cum omnibus sanctis, quæ sit latitudo, et longitudo, et sublimitas, et profundum:
verses.greek_textus_receptus: ἵνα ἐξισχύσητε καταλαβέσθαι σὺν πᾶσιν τοῖς ἁγίοις τί τὸ πλάτος καὶ μῆκος καὶ βάθος καὶ ὕψος
verses.king_james: May be able to comprehend with all saints what *is* the breadth, and length, and depth, and height;

verses.latin_vulgate: scire etiam supereminentem scientiæ caritatem Christi, ut impleamini in omnem plenitudinem Dei.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: γνῶναί τε τὴν ὑπερβάλλουσαν τῆς γνώσεως ἀγάπην τοῦ χριστοῦ ἵνα πληρωθῆτε εἰς πᾶν τὸ πλήρωμα τοῦ θεοῦ
verses.king_james: And to know the love of Christ, which passeth knowledge, that ye might be filled with all the fulness of God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ei autem, qui potens est omnia facere superabundanter quam petimus aut intelligimus, secundum virtutem, quæ operatur in nobis:
verses.greek_textus_receptus: τῷ δὲ δυναμένῳ ὑπὲρ πάντα ποιῆσαι ὑπὲρ ἐκ περισσοῦ ὧν αἰτούμεθα ἢ νοοῦμεν κατὰ τὴν δύναμιν τὴν ἐνεργουμένην ἐν ἡμῖν
verses.king_james: Now unto him that is able to do exceeding abundantly above all that we ask or think, according to the power that worketh in us,

verses.latin_vulgate: ipsi gloria in Ecclesia, et in Christo Jesu, in omnes generationes sæculi sæculorum. Amen.
verses.greek_textus_receptus: αὐτῷ ἡ δόξα ἐν τῇ ἐκκλησίᾳ ἐν χριστῷ ἰησοῦ εἰς πάσας τὰς γενεὰς τοῦ αἰῶνος τῶν αἰώνων ἀμήν
verses.king_james: Unto him *be* glory in the church by Christ Jesus throughout all ages, world without end. Amen.
